title: SimpleMinigames
description: This mod will add minigames that are easy to use and to customize.
body:
This mod will add this 
- Games:
    - BedWars
    - SkyWars(wip)
    - SkyBlock(wip)
    - Other(wip)
- Features:
    - Customizable item generator that you can use in other game modes
    - Simple commands
- How to use:
    - All bedwars-related commands starts with "bw".  
    - Place generators on your map and set cooldown time and item to spawn(if you are on a server, use command /setnbt n "cooldowntime" when you are looking at the generator).
    - Place team beds(red,blue,green,yellow) and use the  command /bwteambedset "red,blue,green,yellow".
    - Set teams spawn points with the command /bwspawnset "red,blue,green,yellow". It will set spawnpoint on the block you are standing on.
    - Place lobby with the command /bwlobbyset. It will set lobby coordinates on the block you are standing.
    - Place shop signs on every islands with the command /bwshopsigngive.
    - Use the /bwstart command.
    - Enjoy!

My curseforge page ----> [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-minigames](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-minigames)
